news.title: Jaipur's draft master plan 2047 lacks central government's guidelines: Experts
news.para: A new study reveals significant flaws in Jaipur's Master Plan 2047, suggesting its proposed expansion violates URDPFI guidelines. Experts warn the plan's inclusion of vast rural areas and excessive urbanizable land could severely impact civic services and infrastructure quality for residents.

news.title: ED attaches fresh ₹5,000 crore assets in case against PACL
news.para: The Enforcement Directorate has attached properties valued at over Rs 5,000 crore. This action is part of a money laundering probe into the PACL ponzi scheme. The scheme allegedly defrauded lakhs of investors of approximately Rs 48,000 crore. This latest attachment brings the total seized assets to over Rs 22,000 crore. The investigation stems from a 2014 CBI case.

news.title: Delhi: Get provisional NOC for house by paying 25% of infrastructure charges upfront
news.para: Delhi Jal Board has approved a significant reform in infrastructure charge payments, allowing property owners to obtain a provisional NOC by paying 25% upfront during building plan approval. This move aims to unlock stalled projects and ease financial burdens, with the remaining charges adjusted later based on final rates.

news.title: Lucknow: LDA clears ₹5,148 crore budget with focus on affordable housing, new schemes
news.para: The Lucknow Development Authority has approved a Rs 5,148 crore budget for 2026-27, prioritizing affordable housing and new townships. The plan includes Rs 200 crore for 848 flats in Sharda Nagar Extension and Rs 1,600 crore for land acquisition. The budget also allocates funds for infrastructure development, parks, and measures against illegal construction.

news.title: With 12,772 cases, Karnataka ranks fourth nationally in RERA complaints
news.para: Karnataka shows strong Rera activity with many complaints filed and resolved.  This indicates a healthy real estate market and active buyer engagement.  However, the actual execution of Rera orders, like getting money or keys, remains a significant hurdle.  District administration bottlenecks slow down the process.  Nationally, Uttar Pradesh leads in complaint filings.

news.title: Indiabulls to jointly develop 2.38 acres land in Gurugram; TARC launches additional phase at Gurugram project
news.para: Indiabulls is developing a commercial project in Gurugram with a gross development value of ₹600 crore. TARC has launched a new phase for its residential project in Gurugram. This expansion adds six towers and 518 units. The total project has a development potential of 1.7 million sq ft and a GDV of ₹3,600 crore.

news.title: Madurai civic body's digital shift to aid smarter taxes and faster services
news.para: Madurai Corporation is enhancing urban management through digital asset mapping and a unified database, integrating civic infrastructure and utilities for improved planning and reduced manual work. Technological upgrades to the ICCC, including a modernized grievance redressal system and public health monitoring, further refine city services and operational efficiency.

news.title: Onward Workspaces lease out 1.65 lakh sq ft office space to Accenture in Noida
news.para: Onward Workspaces has leased 1.65 lakh sq ft of office space to Accenture in Noida's sector 132, accommodating 1,460 workstations across eight floors. This significant deal expands Onward Workspaces' managed portfolio to over eight lakh sq ft in Delhi NCR. The company is also developing a new co-working center in Connaught Place.

news.title: Property mutation portal for Mumbai launched; provides fully online service
news.para: Mumbai has launched a new online portal for property mutations. Property owners, including NRIs, can now apply for name transfers and other changes from anywhere. This digital service eliminates the need to visit government offices. The portal offers real-time SMS alerts and online status tracking for 45 types of property changes. A help desk is available for technical assistance.

news.title: NBCC to develop ₹5,800 crore Rajasthan Mandapam in Jaipur
news.para: NBCC India will develop Rajasthan Mandapam and allied infrastructure near Jaipur International Airport on over 90 acres, with a project value exceeding ₹5,800 crore. The master plan includes a convention center, expo halls, IT/ITES spaces, hotels, retail, housing, a museum, and a fintech plaza. NBCC will implement this self-financing project, with tenders expected in April 2026.

news.title: RIICO brings in lease plan for 33 years, offers 40% discount on land
news.para: Rajasthan's RIICO is set to significantly lower industrial setup costs. Entrepreneurs will get plots at 60% of current rates with a 33-year lease. Payment periods are extended to five years. Transfer charges and conversion fees are reduced. New plug-and-play facilities and land for fixed use will be available at low annual rents. RIICO will also fund real estate ventures.

news.title: Prayagraj development body to revise rates of unsold flats, ease rules
news.para: The Prayagraj Development Authority (PDA) is revising prices for unsold residential units to boost sales. Amendments to the Master Plan 2031 will ease construction restrictions in posh areas, allowing taller buildings on smaller plots. The PDA will also conduct a land survey using drones and form a project management unit to ensure development quality.

news.title: Odisha developers urge government to reform land conversion framework
news.para: Odisha's real estate developers are urging the state government to reform its outdated land conversion framework, citing project delays and escalating costs. They point to successful policy shifts in Maharashtra and Karnataka, where land conversion is streamlined or eliminated, to advocate for a more efficient system in Odisha.

news.title: Apollo Global commits $1 billion for retail joint venture with Realty Income
news.para: Realty Income is teaming up with Apollo Global Management to launch a new initiative. They're set to invest $1 billion into acquiring a 49% share of a portfolio filled with high-performing retail venues known for their consistent cash flow.

news.title: Shubham Housing  Finance raises $96 million from LeapFrog Investments, others
news.para: Shubham Housing Development Finance has secured USD 96 million in funding. Existing investor LeapFrog Investments and Creador are among the participants. This investment supports Shubham's expansion and strengthens its shareholder base. The company provides affordable housing finance to India's emerging middle class.

news.title: JSW Cement commissions Nagaur plant, enters north India market; capacity rises to 24.1 MTPA
news.para: JSW Cement has launched its new integrated cement plant in Nagaur, Rajasthan, marking its entry into the North India market. This facility, with a clinkerisation capacity of 3.3 MTPA and cement grinding capacity of 2.5 MTPA, boosts the company's total grinding capacity to 24.1 MTPA. The plant will serve Rajasthan, Haryana, Punjab, and the NCR, with further expansion planned.

news.title: Now, PM Gati Shakti to monitor Gujarat RERA projects
news.para: Gujarat's real estate and urban development departments are integrating GujRERA-registered projects with town planning data, utilizing the PM Gati Shakti platform for enhanced service delivery. This integration aims to spatially align projects with infrastructure, improve visibility of housing clusters, and support evidence-based urban governance for faster approvals and optimized investments.

news.title: Delhi government orders mapping, fire safety audit of commercial units citywide
news.para: Following a tragic fire in Palam that claimed nine lives, Delhi Home Minister Ashish Sood has ordered a comprehensive third-party fire safety audit of all city establishments. This initiative aims to identify safety gaps and ensure compliance with norms. The audit will cover commercial units in mixed-use areas.
